<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-103" location="lines:103-112" -->
```bash
  GENERATE_RESPONSE=$(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:2903/api/validator/v0/admin/external-party/topology/generate \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "party_hint": "'"$PARTY_HINT"'",
    "public_key": "'"$HEX_PUBLIC_KEY"'"
  }')

  echo "$GENERATE_RESPONSE" | jq .

```
